user_query: I want to surprise my friends with personalized gifts. Fetch me the Amazon product details for a customizable item with the product ID B08N5R2GQW. Also, provide me with the product offers available for the same item using the Basic Amazon Scraper API. Furthermore, fetch me some data about the product 'phone' from the Ecommerce Product API.

TaskList.description: Fetch Amazon product details for the customizable item with the product ID B08N5R2GQW.
Fetch product offers available for the item with the product ID B08N5R2GQW using the Basic Amazon Scraper API.
Fetch data about the product 'phone' from the Ecommerce Product API.
